calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

SOPHIA ANDRITSAKIS, Esq. appeared for plaintiff TARGET NATIONAL BANK.
No appearance by defendant GINGER HAMILTON.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff TARGET NATIONAL BANK, and against the Defaulted Defendant GINGER HAMILTON as follows:

DAMAGES $8353.45; COSTS $267.50.; TOTAL JUDGMT $8620.95.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Set For Trial On Feb-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
